Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let all your stress out by singing at the top of your lungs![n]{f 1 5 0}How about some karaoke tonight? {f 1 3 148}{f 1 3 146}[n]We hope to see you![n]---A word from the manager---[n]We're seeing a lot of solo customers lately![n]{f 1 5 0}If you've got what it takes to perform on your own, then come on down![n]{f 1 1}
